_publications._publicationTitle: Image segmentation of plexiform neurofibromas from a deep neural network using multiple b-value diffusion data.

_contextSnippet: The Sørensen–Dice coefficient was 0.77 ± 0.016 (± SEM, range 0.54–0.96).
details: Achieved Sørensen–Dice coefficient of 0.77 ± 0.016 (range 0.54–0.96) when compared with manual segmentation for plexiform neurofibroma volume measurement
